user.title: Search for a station
user.description: Enter (part of) a station name in the VBB area. The API base URL can be left at the default.

station.title: Select the station
station.description: Pick one of the matching stations.

lines.title: Select lines for {station}
lines.description: Each selected line + direction will become its own sensor showing the next actual departure (delay included).

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach transport.rest. Try again in a moment.
error.no_lines_found: No departures were found at this station even in the next 48 hours, so no lines could be detected. Try again later or pick a different station.
error.station_not_found: The chosen station is no longer in the search results — please search again.
